title: Match Columns to columns in another board
excerpt: So I have two boards. A Prospect board, and a deal status board. Once a prospect has moved through the pipeline, it gets mirrored to the deal status board. However, one issue. Zapier doesn’t recognize mirrored columns & …

posts.author: Aliq21 (Christian Higgins)
posts.cookedHtml:
So I have two boards. A Prospect board, and a deal status board. Once a prospect has moved through the pipeline, it gets mirrored to the deal status board. However, one issue. Zapier doesn’t recognize mirrored columns & cannot grab the values.

Is there anyway to have fields that auto populate to the same (value) on the other board?
Basically connecting two boards without using the (mirror) function?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Aliq21

There are app (like Match Index Column) that “mirror” data from one board to another using normal monday columns (no mirrors).
